rulings.Case Title: CYRUS LAFARRE VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday June 24, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party indicated that only fact 21 is disputed (no evidence in support cited) and did not provide any additional material facts. Nothing in Plaintiff's declaration creates a triable issue of fact regarding equity in the property: Plaintiff provides no evidence that loan modification was wrongfully denied in light of his income; or that a foreclosure alternative would yield sufficient funds to cover all the liabilities, including three Deeds of Trust and a judgment. = (501/REQ)
